steps.title: Compare the two slopes
steps.content:
The equations are both linear:
$$
y=x+15
$$
$$
y=5x
$$
Their slopes are $1$ and $5$, so the lines are not parallel.

steps.title: Use the intersection rule
steps.content: Two different nonparallel lines in the $xy$-plane intersect at exactly one point. That means the graphs have $1$ point of intersection.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two equations also shows exactly one shared point. The answer is B.
